name: Obfuscated Windows Command Shell Execution
description: Detects cmd.exe with environment variable obfuscation or caret insertion
query:
// Detect obfuscated cmd.exe commands using caret or variable insertion
// Trigger on heavy caret usage or variable expansion tricks
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)cmd\.exe$"
  and cmdline matches "(\^.){5,}|%[a-zA-Z]+:[~][0-9]"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
